Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product pages, promotions, and brake part details to ground the email in up-to-date inventory and offers.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live products and active deals, reducing customer confusion and increasing click-through relevance.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete marketing email — subject line, body copy, and CTA — tailored to R1 Concepts brake parts using the scraped site content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Eliminates daily copywriting work for the marketing team, delivering brand-consistent, conversion-focused email content in seconds.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and sends the AI-generated email to the target contact list via the HubSpot Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates daily email deployment without manual scheduling, keeping the audience engaged with fresh content every day.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current DFC product lines, friction material details, and any active promotions to inform email content.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Writes a complete daily marketing email for DFC including subject line, promotional body copy, and product-focused CTAs.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Sends the finalized DFC email to the designated contact list using the HubSpot Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures reliable, trackable daily delivery to DFC's audience, with open and click data captured automatically inside HubSpot.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls open support tickets from HubSpot, including customer messages, ticket categories, and associated contact records.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a contextual, brand-appropriate reply for the R1 Concepts support team to review.

R1 Support Agent.action: Writes the classified ticket type and AI-drafted reply back to the HubSpot ticket record for agent review and sending.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all support activity centralized in HubSpot, so agents can approve and send replies in one click without switching tools.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all in-box flyer return and issue form submissions stored in HubSpot, capturing each customer's reported problem and order details.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Centralizes all Amazon return and issue data from a single reliable source, eliminating manual form exports and reducing data gaps.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the pulled HubSpot form submissions into a structured Google Sheet, appending new records and organizing columns for analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the operations and product team a living, always-current spreadsheet for spotting return trends, defect patterns, and high-issue SKUs.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact and activity records to detect when a known DFC customer visits or engages with the R1 Concepts website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Surfaces high-intent buying signals in real time, giving the sales team a precise window to reach out while the customer is actively engaged.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Eliminates the lag between customer activity and sales follow-up, enabling same-minute outreach that significantly improves conversion rates.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts is currently in development with connections to be determined.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will enable automated, intelligent customer interactions for R1 Concepts once deployed.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories, listings, and web sources daily to identify businesses near Cerritos that may need warehouse or office space.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Automates prospecting that would take hours of manual research, consistently filling the top of the outreach funnel with fresh, relevant leads.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Finds and validates contact email addresses for the identified businesses to enable direct outreach.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Converts raw business leads into actionable contacts, maximizing the number of warm intros that can actually be delivered.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Ensures every qualified lead gets a timely, personalized outreach without any manual sending, accelerating the path to a signed sublet.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls live campaign performance data across all R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts including spend, impressions, clicks, and ACOS.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes campaign performance data and generates optimization recommendations including bid adjustments, budget reallocations, and keyword actions.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Delivers expert-level ad analysis instantly, reducing wasted ad spend and improving ROAS without requiring constant manual campaign audits.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube using provided keywords to find relevant content creators, retrieving channel metadata, subscriber counts, and recent video performance.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Rapidly surfaces a broad pool of relevant creators at scale, replacing hours of manual YouTube searching with structured, keyword-targeted discovery.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Cross-references discovered creators on Instagram to retrieve follower counts, engagement data, and profile details for multi-platform profiling.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Builds a fuller picture of each creator's total reach and cross-platform presence, improving the quality of partnership decisions.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes aggregated creator data from all platforms and produces a structured discovery report ranking creators by keyword relevance and audience fit.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Cuts creator vetting time from days to minutes by delivering AI-ranked, ready-to-review creator profiles with actionable fit assessments.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, niche alignment, audience size, and content quality.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Transforms a raw list of creators into a prioritized, scored shortlist, ensuring outreach budget and effort goes to the highest-potential partners first.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves qualified creator profiles, outreach templates, and learned sequence prompts stored in Drive documents and folders.
Creator Outreach.impact: Centralizes all creator data and messaging frameworks so the agent always uses the most current targeting criteria and approved copy.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach messages for each qualified creator by applying learned sequence logic and brand voice prompts.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, on-brand outreach at scale without manual copywriting, dramatically increasing response likelihood while saving hours of drafting time per campaign.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends personalized outreach emails to each qualified creator and logs delivery status for follow-up sequencing.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates high-volume creator contact without any manual sending, ensuring every qualified creator is reached on schedule with zero inbox management overhead.

Creator Reponse.action: Pulls historical influencer email threads, negotiation outcomes, and conversation patterns to inform AI response logic.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds every AI-generated reply in real past negotiations, ensuring responses reflect proven tactics and acceptable deal terms rather than generic language.

Creator Reponse.action: Reads incoming creator replies and generates contextually appropriate negotiation responses using patterns learned from historical influencer conversations.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles back-and-forth negotiation autonomously, compressing deal cycles from days to hours while maintaining consistent brand positioning across all conversations.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors the inbox for creator replies, surfaces them to the AI for processing, and sends AI-generated negotiation responses back to creators.
Creator Reponse.impact: Eliminates manual inbox monitoring and response drafting, allowing one team member to manage dozens of active creator negotiations simultaneously.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Reads MHM vehicle data and the New Availability Guide, then matches part numbers to generate a formatted load sheet for the week.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Replaces hours of manual cross-referencing between two large product datasets, producing an accurate load sheet in seconds with no lookup errors.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Creates and populates a HubSpot email draft with the finalized sales sheet and load sheet attached, then sends it to the designated recipient list.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Ensures every Monday email goes out on time with accurate, current product data, eliminating the risk of missed sends or outdated attachments.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Posts a confirmation message to the relevant Teams channel once the email has been successfully created and sent.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Gives the marketing team instant visibility into send status without needing to log into HubSpot, keeping everyone aligned with zero manual reporting.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates compelling product launch copy and monthly recap narratives based on new product data, brand guidelines, and campaign objectives.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Cuts email copywriting time from hours to minutes, delivering polished launch messaging the moment new products are ready to promote.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates fully formatted HubSpot email drafts for First to Market launches and monthly recap emails, attaching the relevant sales sheets and staging them for review.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Eliminates manual email building in HubSpot, so the team can review and approve launch emails rather than construct them, accelerating time-to-send for new product drops.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts lifecycle stage metrics, email performance data, and contact growth figures for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Pulls structured CRM data instantly rather than requiring manual exports, ensuring slide metrics reflect the exact same numbers across all reporting.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves SMS campaign performance data including send volume, click rates, and revenue attribution for the month.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Integrates SMS results directly into the deck without manual data pulls, giving leadership a complete cross-channel view in one place.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls web traffic, session, conversion, and channel performance data for the reporting month.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Automates the most time-consuming part of deck prep, replacing 30–60 minutes of manual GA4 report building with an instant data fetch.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Writes all collected metrics from HubSpot, Attentive, GA4, and Search Console directly into slides 48–55 of the monthly Marketing Highlights deck.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers a fully populated, presentation-ready deck section in seconds, eliminating manual copy-paste errors and freeing the marketing team from repetitive slide updates each month.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts has low impressions or rankings compared to competitor content targeting the same terms.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Focuses content production exclusively on high-opportunity gaps, ensuring every blog post targets queries with real traffic potential rather than already-saturated topics.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Produces fully written, SEO-structured blog articles targeting the identified keyword gaps, formatted to meet Yoast SEO requirements.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Generates publication-ready blog content at scale, compressing what would be days of writing and optimization work into minutes per article.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the AI-generated blog post to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO fields populated including focus keyword, meta title, and description.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Eliminates all manual CMS work and SEO field entry, allowing the team to ship optimized content consistently without touching the WordPress backend.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open purchase order data including vendor names, PO numbers, order dates, and outstanding line items requiring follow-up.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Captures the full vendor PO backlog automatically, replacing manual ERP report generation and ensuring no outstanding orders are overlooked.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Uploads transformed PO data into HubSpot, creating or updating vendor contact records and enrolling them in automated chase email sequences.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Turns raw ERP exports into actionable CRM workflows, ensuring every overdue vendor receives a timely follow-up without any manual outreach coordination.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number inputs directly in the browser and matches them against the embedded New Availability Guide data without any server or API dependency.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Gives any team member instant load sheet generation from any machine with a browser, removing reliance on shared files, ERP access, or technical setup.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Formats all matched vehicle and part number data into a structured DFC load sheet and exports it as a downloadable Excel file.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Produces a print- and upload-ready load sheet in seconds, eliminating manual spreadsheet formatting and reducing load sheet prep from 30+ minutes to under one minute.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Uses Chrome browser automation to log into Attentive, locate the previous week's MHM SMS campaign, and clone it as the starting point for the new campaign.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Bypasses the lack of an Attentive API to automate repetitive campaign setup, saving 20–30 minutes of manual platform navigation every week.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Updates the cloned campaign with the current week's MHM vehicle name in the message body and sets the correct scheduled send time, then saves the campaign.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC sales transaction data including customer purchase history, order frequency, product mix, and revenue figures for analysis.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Provides a complete, up-to-date sales dataset that powers all downstream segmentation and campaign logic, replacing manual report pulls from the ERP.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into cohorts based on purchase behavior — active, at-risk, lapsed, and cross-sell candidates — and enrolls each into targeted email automation sequences.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Activates personalized reorder reminders, cross-sell campaigns, and win-back flows automatically, driving incremental revenue without manual campaign management.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Sends targeted SMS messages to high-priority customer segments identified in the analysis, including win-back offers and reorder nudges.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Reaches lapsed and at-risk customers through a high-engagement channel, increasing response rates beyond email alone and recovering revenue that would otherwise go to competitors.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual file tracking and ensures the automation triggers only when fresh session data is available, removing human handoff delays.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a public download URL to replace the previous week's link.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Ensures subscribers always receive a working, current download link without manual file uploads or URL updates.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download link, and schedules send for 8AM Saturday.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a consistently branded weekly email to the full list on schedule with zero manual email building, saving 1–2 hours of marketing work per week.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully structured B2B SEO blog posts targeting DFC's core audiences — shops, distributors, and fleets — using keyword briefs and brand guidelines.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready SEO content at scale without writer hours, consistently targeting high-intent B2B search terms that drive qualified organic traffic.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog post and publishes it with proper SEO metadata, categories, and tags applied.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style video references, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images and Wikimedia Commons, and retrieves vehicle history and specs from Wikipedia.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives the scraped vehicle data and writes a complete Friction Friday video script including intro hook, technical breakdown, and outro in the established show format.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the AI-written script into a studio-quality voiceover audio file using a consistent branded voice.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Removes the need for a recording session entirely, delivering a finished narration track that matches every other episode in tone and cadence.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives the completed script, audio file, and selected thumbnail image and assembles the full video package, logging all assets and metadata to the tracking sheet via Apps Script webhook.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Delivers a complete, ready-to-upload Friction Friday package — script, voiceover, thumbnail, and assembled video — in one place, compressing a multi-hour production workflow into minutes.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Exports DFC customer records including Dream CustomerIDs, contact details, and account data for mapping.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is currently in the planning stage with connections and workflow not yet defined.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword ranking positions, impressions, clicks, and CTR data for all DFC blog posts.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves session counts, traffic sources, bounce rates, and goal completions for blog-originated traffic.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves monthly blog traffic, audience engagement metrics, and conversion events attributed to organic blog visits.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors the Outlook inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice PDFs attached to emails and triggers the processing workflow upon detection.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks which DFC prospect pages are visited and passes behavioral data to HubSpot to trigger the correct workflow phase.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Captures incoming customer support tickets and passes the raw message content into the AI processing pipeline.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Gerrit Young drops the monthly new arrivals file into Teams, signaling the agent to begin the NAG distribution workflow.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls current week performance data from all three paid ad platforms including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversions.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Extracts full-month performance data from all paid channels including spend, reach, conversions, and ROAS for the reporting period.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Delivers the completed monthly report to stakeholders formatted and ready to be dropped into the end-of-month slide deck.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Detects when a contact completes the Amazon flyer warranty registration and tags them with a qualifying segment property.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors project tasks and status updates across boards, detecting changes, overdue items, or new assignments that require attention.
Asana Agent.impact: Keeps task visibility current without requiring manual status checks, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks across active projects.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures the transcript or notes from the weekly media meeting and passes the raw discussion content downstream for processing.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Receives or forwards the meeting notes as a structured message that feeds into the Claude processing step for task extraction.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Reads the meeting notes and extracts discrete tasks, assigns owners, infers due dates, and formats each item as an Asana-ready task.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Pulls performance data for all active search ads, flagging underperforming ads based on CTR, conversion rate, and Quality Score thresholds.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the latest state of the Agent Tracker sheet, pulling all agent names, statuses, owners, and recent activity logs for the current week.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Sends the formatted weekly agent update to the relevant stakeholders on a scheduled cadence.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Keeps the entire team aligned on automation progress without requiring anyone to chase down updates or log into a shared sheet.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle specification (make, model, year, and relevant attributes) through a HubSpot form, triggering the workflow automatically.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Standardizes the request intake so every catalog lookup starts with clean, structured data — no back-and-forth emails or incomplete specs to chase down.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries the Dream ERP for all parts DFC currently stocks that match the submitted vehicle specification.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Instantly surfaces what's in inventory for that vehicle without requiring a manual catalog search, turning a lookup that could take hours into a seconds-long query.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Compares the stocked parts list against the full expected catalog for that vehicle and identifies gaps — parts the vehicle requires that DFC does not currently carry.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces a precise in-stock vs. missing analysis automatically, giving Mark exactly the information needed to spot coverage gaps and procurement opportunities.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Delivers a formatted Excel file to Mark showing stocked parts, missing parts, and coverage gaps for the requested vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Mark receives a complete, presentation-ready catalog in his inbox within minutes of submitting the form, replacing what was previously a manual multi-system lookup process.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, including on-hand quantity, on-order quantity, and in-transit status.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with one automated pull, giving the entire team a single consistent view of live inventory status in real time.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches each line of the backorder report with the live Dream data, appending inventory status columns and flagging any parts with no on-hand, no open PO, and no inbound shipment as dead-end items.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a raw backorder list into a prioritized, actionable report that immediately shows which orders can be resolved and which require escalation — without any manual cross-referencing.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for affected backorder lines, pre-populated with the relevant part status and estimated resolution path.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Cuts the time spent writing customer update emails to near zero while ensuring every impacted customer receives a timely, accurate status update rather than waiting for a rep to get to it manually.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online product catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all two-piece rotor listings with associated make, model, year, and part fitment data.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Assembles a comprehensive competitive catalog in minutes that would take days to compile manually, ensuring DFC has a complete picture of the two-piece rotor market.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts to identify overlapping coverage and gaps where competitors offer fitments DFC does not.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Pinpoints exactly where DFC has product gaps in the two-piece rotor category, giving Dino a prioritized list of fitments to evaluate for new part development.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking about demand for specific two-piece rotor fitments identified as gaps in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signal from the market automatically, so product decisions are backed by customer data rather than assumptions — without requiring manual outreach campaigns.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, cross-reference results, and customer response data into a single formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino one clean, always-current document with everything needed to make two-piece rotor catalog decisions — no manual data assembly or hunting across multiple sources.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy fields — headlines, primary text, descriptions, and CTAs — across every live campaign and ad set.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures the full universe of running ad copy in one automated pull, replacing what would otherwise require manually opening and reading every active ad across every account.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every pulled copy field for the specified target phrases and returns a flagged list showing the exact ad, field name, and verbatim copy where each match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a problematic or targeted phrase across all active ads instantly, eliminating the risk of missing a match that a manual review might overlook.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted flagged-copy report to the requester listing every match with the ad name, field, platform, and exact copy excerpt for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a complete, audit-ready findings report on demand in minutes, giving the team immediate visibility to act on compliance, legal, or brand concerns without delay.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the resume attachment and applicant details from each email.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures no application is missed or sits unprocessed in a shared inbox, creating an automatic intake pipeline that captures every candidate the moment they apply.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to a structured folder in Drive, organized by role and applicant name, before passing it to Claude for scoring.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a permanent, organized archive of every applicant so the hiring team can reference original documents anytime without digging through email threads.

Resume Bot.action: Reads the resume content, scores the candidate against the requirements of open roles, and returns a hiring decision: approve for review, deny, or flag as pending due to a paused role.
Resume Bot.impact: Delivers a consistent, criteria-based screening decision for every applicant in seconds, removing the inconsistency and time cost of manual resume reviews across a high-volume inbox.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant's name, role, score, decision, and Drive file link to the dashboard, routing pending candidates to a dedicated Pending tab, and triggers auto-reply emails to denied or no-resume applicants.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a real-time, filterable view of every candidate and decision while ensuring denied applicants receive a timely response — replacing a manual tracking process that loses candidates and creates delayed communications.

summary: The AI automation pipeline continues to grow steadily, with 56 total agents across the board — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While things were quiet on the update front, the 28 completed agents continue running in the background, driving daily email campaigns, SEO content, support automation, paid media audits, and more. Great momentum built into the pipeline — looking forward to more completions in the weeks ahead!
